  • API Reference
    • S2E — Core Data Structure
      • class SubCE
        • Constructor Parameters
        • Class Attributes
        • Instance Methods
        • Usage Example
    • S2E.get — Data Extraction
      • get_membrane_polygon(data, cell_id=None, cell_boundaries_key='cell_boundaries', nuclei_boundaries_key='nuclei_boundaries', return_polygon=False)
      • get_gene_data(data, pts_key='points', cell_id=None, gene_name=None, exclude_cell_id=None, top_genes_by_expression=None, return_top_genes_list=False) -> pd.DataFrame | tuple
      • get_normalized_membrane(pseudo_cell_boundaries_radius=2.783) -> tuple[Polygon, Polygon]
        • Usage Example
    • S2E.processing — Data Processing
      • process_spatialdata_for_s2e(cell_boundaries, nuclei_boundaries, points_df, ...) -> sd.SpatialData
      • normalize(data, pseudo_cell_boundaries_radius=2.783, ..., num_processes=2, copy=False) -> SubCE | None
      • normalize_one_cell(gene_data, cell_membrane, nuclei_membrane, pseudo_cell_boundaries_radius=2.783) -> pd.DataFrame
      • reconstruct(data, pts_key='points', ..., model_root_path='./ot_models', num_processes=2, copy=False) -> SubCE | None
      • reconstruct_one_cell(gene_data, gene_name, cell_boundary, cell_id, model_root_path='./ot_models') -> pd.DataFrame
      • generate_image_data(data, layer, pts_key, ..., dpi=200, num_processes=2) -> None
    • S2E.aug — Augmentation
      • cell_gene_augmentation(data, pts_key='points', ..., k=19, ..., num_processes=4, copy=False) -> SubCE | None
        • Core Parameters
        • Auxiliary Cell Mapping
        • Discouraged Parameters (closest_pattern only)
        • Returns
      • build_reference_auxiliary_map(cells, step=20, drop_last=True) -> dict
      • get_similar_cells_in_morphology(sdata=None, tiff_root_path=None, ...) -> dict[int, list[int]]
        • Usage Example
    • S2E.analysis — Embedding & Pattern Analysis
      • Embedding Extraction
        • get_embedding(img_path_list, model_path, ...) -> np.ndarray
        • get_dataset_embeddings(img_root_path, model_path, ...) -> AnnData
        • get_blank_pseudocell_embedding(model_path, ...) -> np.ndarray
      • Pattern Prediction
        • pattern_predict(img_path_list, pretrained_model_path, ...) -> pd.DataFrame
        • pattern_predict_for_dataset(img_root_path, pretrained_model_path, ...) -> AnnData
      • Data Classes
        • class EmbeddingAnndata
        • class ImageDataset(Dataset)
        • class CustomImageFolder(ImageFolder)
      • Visualization
        • draw_cell_gene(gene_data=None, cell_boundary=None, nuclei_boundary=None, ...) -> None
        • plot_pca_heatmap(gene_level_pca, ...) -> tuple | None
        • plot_umap_from_adata(adata, color_by='feature_name', ..., leiden=False, ...) -> tuple | None
    • S2E.models — Model Infrastructure
      • class HuggingFace_Model(nn.Module)
        • forward(pixel_values: torch.Tensor) -> dict
      • train_ot_model(cell_boundaries, nuclei_boundaries, cell_id=None, ...) -> None
      • Model Utilities (_model_utils.py, _cached.py)
      • Trainer Module (trainer.py)
        • Usage Example
    • S2E.utils — Utilities
      • I/O Functions
        • save(data, file_path, verbose=False) -> None
        • load(file_path, verbose=False) -> Any
        • save_to_spatialdata(data, prefix='SubCE', ...) -> SpatialData
        • load_from_spatialdata(sdata, prefix='SubCE', ...) -> SubCE
      • Distance Metrics
        • cosine_dissimilarity(emb1, emb2) -> float
      • Point-Polygon Operations (pts_polygon_related.py)
        • Usage Example
S2E API Documentation
  • Quick Start
  • View page source

Quick Start

This guide walks you through the core S2E workflow: from raw transcript data to embeddings and pattern prediction.

Step 1: Import S2E and Create a SubCE Object

import pandas as pd
import geopandas as gpd
from shapely.geometry import Polygon
from S2E import SubCE

# Minimal example: one cell, one gene
gene_data = pd.DataFrame({
    'x': [0.1, 0.3, -0.2, 0.5, -0.1],
    'y': [0.2, -0.1, 0.4, -0.3, 0.1],
    'cell': [1, 1, 1, 1, 1],
    'feature_name': ['RPS3'] * 5,
})

cell_boundaries = gpd.GeoSeries(
    Polygon([(-3, -3), (-3, 3), (3, 3), (3, -3)]),
    index=[1]
)
nuclei_boundaries = gpd.GeoSeries(
    Polygon([(-1, -1), (-1, 1), (1, 1), (1, -1)]),
    index=[1]
)

# The 'nuclei' column can be auto-computed if omitted
se = SubCE(gene_data, cell_boundaries, nuclei_boundaries)

Step 2: Normalize to Pseudo-Cell Space

from S2E import processing
processing.normalize(se, num_processes=2)

# Access the normalized layer
norm_layer = se['normalized']
print(norm_layer.uns['points'].head())

Step 3: Metacell Augmentation (Recommended for Sparse Data)

from S2E import aug

# k=19: use 19 auxiliary cells to augment each reference cell
aug.cell_gene_augmentation(se, k=19, num_processes=4)

# Augmented points are stored under 'augmented_points'
aug_pts = se['normalized'].uns['augmented_points']
print(f"Augmented: {len(aug_pts)} points across {aug_pts['cell'].nunique()} cells")

Step 4: Generate Images

from S2E import processing

# Generate PNG images for each cell-gene combination
processing.generate_image_data(
    se,
    layer='normalized',
    pts_key='augmented_points',  # use augmented points
    save_root_path='./images_data',
    dpi=200,
    num_processes=4
)

Step 5: Extract Embeddings

from S2E import analysis

# Get embeddings for all images using the pre-trained model
adata = analysis.get_dataset_embeddings(
    img_root_path='./images_data',
    model_path='./S2E-pattern-model/pytorch_model.bin',  # path to pretrained weights
    batch_size=64,
    num_workers=4
)

print(f"Embedding shape: {adata.shape}")
print(f"Genes: {adata.obs['feature_name'].unique()}")

Step 6: Predict Localization Patterns

# Predict pattern proportions for each image
pattern_adata = analysis.pattern_predict_for_dataset(
    img_root_path='./images_data',
    pretrained_model_path='./S2E-pattern-model/pytorch_model.bin'
)

# Each row is a softmax over 7 patterns (sums to 1)
print(pattern_adata.var['pattern'].tolist())
print(pattern_adata.X[:3])  # first 3 predictions

Step 7: Downstream Analysis

import scanpy as sc

# PCA and UMAP on embeddings
sc.pp.pca(adata, n_comps=50)
sc.pp.neighbors(adata, n_neighbors=15, use_rep='X_pca')
sc.tl.umap(adata)

# Visualize
from S2E.analysis import plot_umap_from_adata
plot_umap_from_adata(adata, color_by='feature_name', show=True)

Full Workflow with SpatialData

For real spatial omics data (MERFISH, Xenium, etc.):

from S2E.processing import process_spatialdata_for_s2e
from S2E.get import get_gene_data, get_membrane_polygon

# 1. Convert raw data to SpatialData
sdata = process_spatialdata_for_s2e(
    cell_boundaries=cell_gdf,
    nuclei_boundaries=nuc_gdf,
    points_df=points_df,
    num_processes=4,
    verbose=True
)

# 2. Extract data for SubCE
gene_df = get_gene_data(sdata, top_genes_by_expression=500)
cell_bounds, nuc_bounds = get_membrane_polygon(sdata)

# 3. Create SubCE and continue the pipeline
se = SubCE(gene_df, cell_bounds, nuc_bounds)
# ... (continue from Step 2 above)
